title: The Intouchables
tmdbOverview: A true story of two men who should never have met – a quadriplegic aristocrat who was injured in a paragliding accident and a young man from the projects.
synopsis: The Intouchables (2011) is a drama and comedy film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
